description_long: This is a vintage manual coffee grinder with a square wooden base and a prominent metal grinding bowl on top. The base features a small pull-out drawer for collecting ground material, and the top is fitted with a long, curved metal crank arm ending in a rounded wooden handle. The grinding bowl is shallow and circular, with visible gear mechanisms at the center for manual operation. The wood has a polished, reddish-brown finish, while the metal components have a matte, slightly aged appearance. The overall design is compact and functional, evoking a classic, old-fashioned aesthetic suitable for display or use in a kitchen or café setting.
description: A vintage manual coffee grinder with a wooden base, metal grinding bowl, and a long crank handle with a wooden grip. It features a pull-out drawer for collecting grounds and a classic, polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pull-out drawer, the full crank handle, and the central grinding bowl.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the wooden base and the handle extending away from the viewer.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the crank arm and the profile of the grinding bowl and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the wooden handle and the side of the grinder, with the crank arm receding.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a single, rounded wooden grip attached to the end of a long, curved metal crank arm. It is ergonomically shaped for comfortable manual rotation.
